title: Cedilis 15 Pack Clear Cupcake Boxes, 6 Count Cupcake Containers with Gift Ribbon, Plastic Cupcake Carrier Holder for Treat Dessert Cookies Muffins Pastry Baby Shower Party
features: Include 15 pack clear cupcake boxes + 15pcs 6-Cavity inserts +15 ribbons. Each ribbons is 5.2 foot long. The paper inserts keep the cupcakes stay in place from moving around.
Cedilis cupcake carrier is made of high quality plastic, BPA-free, thick, sturdy and durable. Decorated with the ribbons, your cupcake will be more beautiful and delicious.

These 6 count cupcake boxes measures 26.7 cmL*10 cmH*18 cmW, the cardboard inserts diameter is 5 cm, perfect for most regular size cupcakes, also suitable for candy, cookies, pastry, macaron and other treats.
Easy to put put together without glue and tapes. The surface of single cupcake containers has a layer of clear film to prevent the plastic box from scratches. Please peel off it before assembling.

The bakery boxes display your cupcake beautifully and make people easily see the delicious food. A great presentation your cake on birthday party, baby shower, bridal shower, wedding shower, anniversary and Christmas holiday celebration.
